characters.name: Mika Takahashi
characters.background: 41-year-old staff backend engineer at a Toronto fintech, ten years tenure, married, two cats, runs three mornings a week.
characters.personality: Warm, direct, Socratic. Values teaching juniors to need her less. Dry humor.

characters.name: Alex Chen
characters.background: 28-year-old junior engineer two months into their first full-time role, paying down loans, considering a part-time CS MS.
characters.personality: Curious, over-apologetic, gets defensive under judgment, lights up on technical puzzles.

characters.name: Dr. Min-ji Yuen
characters.background: 47-year-old clinical psychologist in Oakland, fifteen years private practice, divorced with two kids.
characters.personality: Warm, precise, slow to intervene. Uses grounded language. Dry humor.

characters.name: Jordan Rivera
characters.background: 34-year-old senior PM at a SaaS company in Oakland, six months into therapy for work anxiety, married to Sam, two dogs.
characters.personality: Carefully self-aware, uses meta-commentary, exercises compulsively when anxious.

characters.name: Elena Garcia
characters.background: 36-year-old Spanish tutor in Madrid, eight years experience, lives with partner Carlos and a cat.
characters.personality: Patient, demanding on pronunciation, mixes drills with realistic conversation.

characters.name: Sam Okafor
characters.background: 42-year-old mechanical engineer in Seattle learning Spanish for a family trip, married with two kids, plays competitive chess.
characters.personality: Literal engineer's mind, asks for rules, embarrassed about pronunciation.

characters.name: Dev Patel
characters.background: 38-year-old strength coach in Austin, NSCA-CSCS certified, married, daughter Aasha is 3.
characters.personality: Calm, precise cueing. Believes in progressive overload and recovery. Honest without humiliating.

characters.name: Taylor Nguyen
characters.background: 31-year-old software engineer in Austin starting strength training for the first time, family history of diabetes.
characters.personality: Self-deprecating, perfectionist, hates running, oddly into deadlifts.

characters.name: Priya Iyer
characters.background: 29-year-old founder of a 4-person early-stage startup in NYC; ex-McKinsey.
characters.personality: Decisive, data-driven, slightly impatient. Loyal to her team.

characters.name: Marcus Webb
characters.background: 32-year-old engineer-turned-cofounder, equal partner to Priya, technical lead.
characters.personality: Quietly principled, sometimes too patient with bad ideas, deep listener.

characters.name: Hana Watanabe
characters.background: 34-year-old freelance illustrator based in Berlin, originally from Kyoto, lived in five countries.
characters.personality: Dreamy in conversation, very specific in work, allergic to small talk.

characters.name: Theo Brennan
characters.background: 33-year-old high-school history teacher in Dublin, Hana's friend of fifteen years from a study-abroad program.
characters.personality: Generous, gossipy, the friend who organizes everyone, struggles with no.

relationships.context: Weekly 1:1 mentorship at the same fintech.
Weekly therapy sessions; Jordan is a returning client.
Strength coaching, two sessions per week.
Cofounders running an early-stage startup together.
Long-distance friends of fifteen years; mostly catch up by video call.
